summary.exports_blocker: MVI template tokens [ACTION], <!--HIDDEN-->, <!--SCRIPT--> not resolved when endpoints accessed directly via HTTP GET. Must be loaded through ERP's internal menu/AJAX navigation system. Browser automation (Playwright persistent context) is the recommended path.
summary.imports_note: Upload mechanism fully mapped. File format/field layout still unknown - need sample files or documentation from KIMCO.
summary.key_finding: ALL import endpoints use a shared ASP.NET file upload page at /module/general/fileupload.aspx with account=eaglesign. This is a standard multipart upload that could be automated with requests/curl once file formats are known.
